visible_characteristics.master_character_design: A pale adult woman twists over a fallen figure with white-pink hair, black restraint-like armor, oversized jagged wrist structures, clawed hands, bare feet, and a sharply arched torso.
visible_characteristics.silhouette_language: Foreshortened claws, angular black restraints, bent legs, hair mass, and the diagonal torso create an irregular aggressive outline, although the cinematic crop and foreground victim interrupt an isolated full-body read.
visible_characteristics.face_psychology: Wide bright eyes, raised cheeks, exposed fangs, an open crooked grin, and the head's inverted angle communicate ecstatic predatory attention rather than a neutral beauty pose.
visible_characteristics.craft_finish: Hard black materials, pale skin, white hair, magenta energy, cyan ice light, and subdued environment masses are separated by controlled edges, selective highlights, and clear focal contrast.
visible_characteristics.coherence_hierarchy: The face and raised claw receive the highest magenta-white contrast; the bent legs and foreground victim form a secondary action path, while the environment stays lower contrast.
visible_characteristics.distinctiveness: The combination of broken restraint devices, ecstatic fang expression, inverted body angle, and close victim interaction provides several mutually reinforcing identity cues.

uncertainties: The file is a wide cinematic scene rather than an isolated transparent full-body master or silhouette sheet.
No native 96-pixel derivative or multi-character roster board is included, so exact small-scale and roster behavior cannot be directly inspected.

visible_characteristics.master_character_design: A small serene humanoid head and armored upper torso rise from an enormous manta-like body with broad violet membranes, black hooked shoulders, bone-colored chest blades, and sweeping wing masses.
visible_characteristics.silhouette_language: The body expands from a narrow head into a huge low fan, with pointed shoulder hooks and wing edges that establish scale and nonhuman anatomy before fine detail.
visible_characteristics.face_psychology: The upright chin, level mouth, narrowed luminous eyes, and distant downward gaze communicate controlled superiority rather than strain or rage.
visible_characteristics.craft_finish: Black armor, bone plates, purple flesh, magenta lights, and blue-violet atmosphere remain materially separated through broad value grouping and selective luminous accents.
visible_characteristics.coherence_hierarchy: The face sits at the top of a bright chest wedge, while paired shoulder lights and converging bone plates guide attention upward through the massive body.
visible_characteristics.distinctiveness: The contrast between a composed humanoid mask and a monumental ray-like lower anatomy supplies a stable dominant contradiction.

uncertainties: The large environmental splash does not expose an isolated complete outer contour or rear anatomy.
The face occupies a small portion of the frame, and no explicit native 96-pixel derivative or roster board is present.

visible_characteristics.master_character_design: A mature silver-haired woman drives horizontally through space in a fitted black-and-gold garment, with a rigid mechanical waist device, cable lines, and two long blade-shaped prosthetic legs.
visible_characteristics.silhouette_language: The forward head, extended pulling arm, trailing hair and coat tails, bent torso, and long paired blade legs form one directional spear-like action silhouette.
visible_characteristics.face_psychology: The profile face uses a lowered brow, narrowed eye, closed mouth, and fixed forward gaze to support disciplined target commitment.
visible_characteristics.craft_finish: Hair, pale fabric, black garment, gold trim, dark metal blades, blue mechanisms, and green architecture are separated with restrained accents and clean edge control.
visible_characteristics.coherence_hierarchy: The face and white hair lead the motion, the blue waist mechanism anchors the body, and repeated gold-blue details connect torso equipment to the blade legs.
visible_characteristics.distinctiveness: The elegant adult profile, tailored upper body, cable tension, and weaponized blade legs combine role, anatomy, and movement in one construction.

uncertainties: The image is an airborne cinematic action crop rather than an isolated neutral master or three-option silhouette sheet.
No exact native 96-pixel derivative or roster comparison is provided.

visible_characteristics.master_character_design: A mature woman stands frontally in a long black tailored coat and fitted corseted layers, holding a large feather quill while multiple sealed paper scrolls curl around her with black branching trails.
visible_characteristics.silhouette_language: Wide pointed shoulders, a narrow waist, long split coat tails, raised quill, and large paper loops create a tall symmetrical core interrupted by orbiting curves.
visible_characteristics.face_psychology: Direct dark eyes, a level head, compressed red lips, and slight facial asymmetry communicate stern controlled attention.
visible_characteristics.craft_finish: Worn black leather, matte cloth, brown paper, red wax, metal trim, pale skin, hair, and feather remain distinguishable through edge wear, restrained highlights, and localized color.
visible_characteristics.coherence_hierarchy: The pale face and quill form the upper focal pair; red wax seals repeat around the figure, while paper loops expand the silhouette without obscuring the central body.
visible_characteristics.distinctiveness: Quill, seals, scroll loops, branching ink-like trails, and layered occult tailoring repeat one document-based construction across prop, silhouette, and surface.

uncertainties: The saturated orange chroma background is not a final use context and materially changes edge contrast.
Thin scrolls, symbols, wax seals, and garment linework have no accompanying native 96-pixel check.
A single character image cannot directly establish roster-level convergence behavior.

benchmarks.artifact_class: User-approved isolated adult female villain master

visible_characteristics.master_character_design: A mature fit woman turns in rear three-quarter view in a backless black leather corset, strapped trousers, long gloves, heeled boots, a skull-shouldered torn cape, and a large serrated sword held down at her side.
visible_characteristics.silhouette_language: The turned torso, exposed shoulder line, fitted legs, trailing cape, and long diagonal sword create a narrow body silhouette with one extended weapon edge.
visible_characteristics.face_psychology: The over-shoulder gaze uses lowered lids, slightly parted lips, head turn, and worn blood-marked skin to communicate guarded, tired, and confrontational attention.
visible_characteristics.craft_finish: Pale scarred skin, matte and worn leather, bone ornament, dark cloth, blood traces, metal blade, and black hair remain separated through dry highlights and localized texture.
visible_characteristics.coherence_hierarchy: The pale face and shoulder lead attention, the corset and straps define the body turn, and the long serrated blade carries the eye down the right edge.
visible_characteristics.distinctiveness: Rear-facing challenge, skull shoulder, scarred pale skin, torn cape, and the heavy serrated sword combine attractiveness with visible combat wear.

uncertainties: The saturated orange chroma background is not a final environment and increases silhouette separation.
No native 96-pixel derivative, alternate silhouette set, or roster board accompanies the image.
